channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Why doctors burn out connecting with patients, and how to fix it [PODCAST]
item.description: Subscribe to The Podcast by KevinMD. Watch on YouTube. Catch up on old episodes! Most doctors were never taught how to sit with a patient's grief, anger, or fear.

item.title: Jeremy Clarkson has aggressive prostate cancer. What makes some cancers more aggressive than others?
item.description: UK media celebrity Jeremy Clarkson this week revealed he has been diagnosed with an aggressive form of prostate cancer.

item.title: Timely 'Nudges' Help Spur Talks on Patient Care Goals
item.description: Simple well-timed prompts to clinicians and patients with advanced cancer can increase conversations around care goals, but clear documentation remains a challenge.

item.title: US Doctors Seek Better Working Conditions in Canada
item.description: US doctors are emigrating to Ontario, British Columbia, and Nova Scotia in response to increasing healthcare bureaucracy and political tensions at home.
